lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing the pinnacle of care and preservation. The exterior paint is flawless, with a mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition, with premium materials that show zero signs of wear and still carry that new-car scent. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that has been kept in pristine, like-new condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery and broken trim pieces. The car has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs.

Check out this budget-friendly find! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest character and visible wear from its time on the road. It remains a reliable choice that’s perfect for anyone seeking practical transportation at a great price. It’s been a steady companion and is ready to get you where you need to go!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owners. Mechanically, it is sound, with a smooth-running engine and responsive handling. The exterior presents well, though there are a few minor cosmetic imperfections, including small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch on the rear fender. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, showing only minimal wear on the upholstery. It comes with a documented service history, proving it has been cared for regularly. This is a reliable and solid vehicle that is ready for many more miles on the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this vehicle has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Everything runs smoothly, and it looks great both inside and out. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and a documented VANOS overhaul. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring polyurethane bushings for increased lateral stiffness. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical components are dialed in for peak performance, offering the tactile feedback and linear power delivery synonymous with BMW’s M division. A structurally sound, mechanically robust machine ready for the apex.
Used vehicle. Good overall condition. Mechanically sound. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for pickup.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, inevitable signs of road use that speak to its history as a dependable driver. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium upholstery remains supple, and every button, dial, and digital display functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule including recent fluid flushes and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. It starts effortlessly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and provides a quiet, composed ride. With a clean title and documented service history, this is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer seeking a high-quality vehicle that has been treated with respect.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Engineered for sustained performance and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless integration of reliability and sophisticated design. Every aspect of this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness, providing an elevated driving experience that delivers exceptional value.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure optimal mechanical performance and retains a polished, professional aesthetic. Offering a balanced combination of durability and comfort, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for your next adventure! It’s super reliable, looks great, and I’ve made sure to keep it well-maintained. I'm looking for a quick sale, so come grab a bargain!

This 996.2 Carrera features the refined 3.6L M96 flat-six, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed G96 manual transaxle. The chassis remains taut with Bilstein B8 dampers and refreshed control arm bushings, preserving the communicative steering rack and weight-transfer characteristics inherent to the rear-engine layout. Recent preventative maintenance includes an IMS bearing retrofit and a new rear main seal to ensure mechanical longevity. Equipped with staggered 18-inch Carrera light-alloy wheels and four-piston monoblock Brembo calipers, this example offers a pure, analog driving experience with a well-sorted powertrain and robust throttle response.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin remains clean and inviting, with well-preserved upholstery and all electronic features—including the navigation and climate control systems—operating exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in strong health; it has benefited from a rigorous service history, including recent fluid changes and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and crisp gear shifts. This is a dependable, high-quality example that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated to ensure peak mechanical performance and aesthetic integrity. Demonstrating a consistent history of rigorous maintenance, it offers a refined driving experience and exceptional reliability. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of luxury and proven longevity.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, the automobile exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a refined interior aesthetic. Prospective buyers will appreciate the seamless integration of reliability and sophisticated engineering, making this an exemplary choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes both quality and fiscal prudence.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This beauty has been well-loved and is still in great shape, running super smoothly and looking fantastic! It’s the perfect companion for your daily commute or those fun weekend road trips. I've taken good care of it, and I'm sure you'll love driving it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double VANOS system. This example is paired with the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. Recent mechanical updates include documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive cooling system refresh to maintain thermal efficiency. The chassis dynamics are sharp, benefiting from a balanced 50/50 weight distribution and responsive MacPherson strut front suspension. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with its enthusiast history, the drivetrain remains potent with a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. A mechanically sound specimen ready for immediate spirited engagement.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor wear on seats. Reliable performance.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that perfectly balances performance and comfort. This car has been a reliable companion and has always been serviced on schedule. The exterior finish still catches the light beautifully, with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful, everyday use. Inside, you'll find a clean, smoke-free cabin where the upholstery remains in great shape and all technological features—from the premium audio system to the climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, the engine is strong and responsive, the transmission shifts smoothly, and the brakes provide confident stopping power. It has recently undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and a fresh oil change, ensuring it is road-ready for its next owner. This vehicle offers a fantastic driving experience for anyone seeking a dependable, high-quality ride.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience that balances sophisticated engineering with enduring performance. Every aspect of this automobile has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. We invite you to experience the seamless integration of luxury and capability firsthand.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, balancing sophisticated engineering with a well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious blend of performance and long-term reliability. Each mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and driver satisfaction. This is a turnkey investment for those who demand quality and poise in their daily commute.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features well-preserved upholstery, a clean dashboard, and all electronic components functioning exactly as they should.
